candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=83%) but green_matches=0, treat the signal as historically unvalidated and require external regime confirmation before sizing above 50%.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches=0 means the current live indicator configuration has never matched a profitable historical pattern in memory — high conviction here reflects crowded agreement on a fresh, untested setup, which institutionally is exactly when consensus trades get faded by liquidity providers who have no positioning history to lean on.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.83 and green_matches == 0 and tradingview_confidence < 0.70: size_multiplier = min(size_multiplier, 0.50)
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces drawdown contribution from unvalidated high-conviction entries; expected Sharpe +0.02-0.03 by trimming variance on USDJPY/AUDNZD where hist_hr=0% coincides with green_matches=0.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows GBPUSD conv=83%, EURUSD conv=100%, AUDUSD conv=100% all with green_matches=0; USDJPY conv=83% and AUDNZD conv=92% have green_matches=0 AND hist_hr=0% — conviction is decoupled from historical hit rate across every pair right now.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 for safe-haven corruption, but current VIX=18.89 with both pairs showing hist_hr=0% suggests the gate alone is not filtering the unreliable rate signal — the green_matches=0 condition may be the dominant failure driver, partially overlapping L8's domain.

reflection.system_health_note: Regime=UNKNOWN with 0 trades in 7 days and every consensus signal at green_matches=0 means the system is in an unvalidated-signal state and should remain near-frozen until live decision logs accumulate.
